name: isPotionDurationMax
desc: True if potion effect duration is at maximum, false otherwise.

name: lastDamage
desc: Damage taken in the last hit. Mobs are resistant to damage less than this for a short time after taking damage.

name: temper
desc: "The higher this value, the more likely the horse is to be tamed next time a player rides it."

name: gson
desc: Cached Gson instance. Set to null when more sections are registered, and then re-created from the builder.

name: muleLeftChest
desc: The left chest box on the mule model.

name: muleRightChest
desc: The right chest box on the mule model.

name: horseRightFaceMetal
desc: The right metal connected to the horse's face ropes.

name: horseLeftFaceMetal
desc: The left metal connected to the horse's face ropes.

name: muleLeftEar
desc: The left ear box for the mule model.

name: muleRightEar
desc: The right ear box for the mule model.

name: horseFaceRopes
desc: The box for the horse's ropes on its face.

name: numericVariablePattern
desc: Pattern that matches numeric variable placeholders in a resource string, such as "%d", "%3$d", "%.2f"

name: genericAttribute
desc: The Attribute this is an instance of

name: attributeMap
desc: The BaseAttributeMap this attributeInstance can be found in

name: isSaved
desc: If false, this modifier is not saved in NBT. Used for "natural" modifiers like speed boost from sprinting

name: previousTotalWorldTime
desc: time what is using to check if InhabitedTime should be calculated

name: playerInstanceList
desc: This field is using when chunk should be processed (every 8000 ticks)

name: previousWorldTime
desc: time what is using when chunk InhabitedTime is being calculated

name: inhabitedTime
desc: the cumulative number of ticks players have been in this chunk

name: iconString
desc: The string associated with this Item's Icon.

name: equalSignSplitter
desc: A Splitter that splits a string on the first "=".  For example, "a=b=c" would split into ["a", "b=c"].

name: lastAttackerTime
desc: Holds the value of ticksExisted when setLastAttacker was last called.

name: worldObj
desc: the instance of the world the tile entity is in.

name: classToNameMap
desc: A HashMap storing the classes and mapping to the string names (reverse of nameToClassMap).

name: blockType
desc: the Block type that this TileEntity is contained within

name: nameToClassMap
desc: A HashMap storing string names of classes mapping to the actual java.lang.Class type.

name: displayString
desc: The string displayed on this control.

name: selectedButton
desc: The button that was just pressed.

name: buttonList
desc: A list of all the buttons in this container.

name: labelList
desc: A list of all the labels in this container.

name: width
desc: The width of the screen object.

name: height
desc: The height of the screen object.

name: itemRender
desc: Holds a instance of RenderItem, used to draw the achievement icons on screen (is based on ItemStack)

name: uuidPattern
desc: Matches a UUID string, such as "b2a72a80-d078-4ea4-ae43-fcaf95707a76".  Will not match UUIDs containing upper-case letters.

name: gameController
desc: Reference to the Minecraft instance, which many handler methods operate on

name: clientWorldController
desc: Reference to the current ClientWorld instance, which many handler methods operate on

name: netManager
desc: The NetworkManager instance used to communicate with the server (used only by handlePlayerPosLook to update positioning and handleJoinGame to inform the server of the client distribution/mods)

name: playerInfoList
desc: An ArrayList of GuiPlayerInfo (includes all the players' GuiPlayerInfo on the current server)

name: mapStorageOrigin
desc: Origin of the central MapStorage serving as a public reference for WorldClient. Not used in this class

name: avRandomizer
desc: Just an ordinary random number generator, used to randomize audio pitch of item/orb pickup and randomize both particlespawn offset and velocity

name: guiScreenServer
desc: Seems to be either null (integrated server) or an instance of either GuiMultiplayer (when connecting to a server) or GuiScreenReamlsTOS (when connecting to MCO server)

name: doneLoadingTerrain
desc: True if the client has finished downloading terrain and may spawn. Set upon receipt of S08PacketPlayerPosLook, reset upon respawning

name: playerInfoMap
desc: A mapping from player names to their respective GuiPlayerInfo (specifies the clients response time to the server)

name: floatingTickCount
desc: Used to keep track of how the player is floating while gamerules should prevent that. Surpassing 80 ticks means kick

name: chatSpamThresholdCount
desc: Incremented by 20 each time a user sends a chat message, decreased by one every tick. Non-ops kicked when over 200

name: floatBuffer
desc: The same memory as byteBuffer, but referenced as an float buffer.

name: shortBuffer
desc: The same memory as byteBuffer, but referenced as an short buffer.

name: intBuffer
desc: The same memory as byteBuffer, but referenced as an integer buffer.

name: rawBufferIndex
desc: The index into the raw buffer to be used for the next data.

name: flipTexture
desc: Set to true if the texture should be flipped horizontally during render*Face

name: blockAccess
desc: The IBlockAccess used by this instance of RenderBlocks

name: renderMinZ
desc: The minimum Z value for rendering (default 0.0).

name: renderMaxZ
desc: The maximum Z value for rendering (default 1.0).

name: renderMinY
desc: The minimum Y value for rendering (default 0.0).

name: renderMaxY
desc: The maximum Y value for rendering (default 1.0).

name: renderMinX
desc: The minimum X value for rendering (default 0.0).

name: renderMaxX
desc: The maximum X value for rendering (default 1.0).

name: underlyingIntegerMap
desc: The backing store that maps Integers to objects.

name: isBlockContainer
desc: true if the Block contains a Tile Entity

name: stepSound
desc: Sound of stepping on the block

name: slipperiness
desc: Determines how much velocity is maintained while moving on top of this block

name: blockHardness
desc: Indicates how many hits it takes to break a block.

name: lightOpacity
desc: How much light is subtracted for going through this block

name: needsRandomTick
desc: Flags whether or not this block is of a type that needs random ticking. Ref-counted by ExtendedBlockStorage in order to broadly cull a chunk from the random chunk update list for efficiency's sake.

name: parentStyle
desc: The parent of this ChatStyle.  Used for looking up values that this instance does not override.

name: rootStyle
desc: The base of the ChatStyle hierarchy.  All ChatStyle instances are implicitly children of this.

name: siblings
desc: The later siblings of this component.  If this component turns the text bold, that will apply to all the siblings until a later sibling turns the text something else.

name: children
desc: The discrete elements that make up this component.  For example, this would be ["Prefix, ", "FirstArg", "SecondArg", " again ", "SecondArg", " and ", "FirstArg", " lastly ", "ThirdArg", " and also ", "FirstArg", " again!"] for "translation.test.complex" (see en-US.lang)

name: lastUpdateTimeInMilliseconds
desc: The time, in milliseconds since epoch, that this instance was last updated

name: canonicalName
desc: The canonical name used to refer to this action.

name: connectionState
desc: The current connection state, being one of: HANDSHAKING, PLAY, STATUS, LOGIN

name: terminationReason
desc: A String indicating why the network has shutdown.

name: socketAddress
desc: The address of the remote party

name: netHandler
desc: The INetHandler instance responsible for processing received packets

name: outboundPacketsQueue
desc: The queue for packets that require transmission

name: isClientSide
desc: Whether this NetworkManager deals with the client or server side of the connection

name: receivedPacketsQueue
desc: The queue for received, unprioritized packets that will be processed at the earliest opportunity

name: chunkTileEntityMap
desc: A Map of ChunkPositions to TileEntities in this chunk

name: fallbackTranslator
desc: A StringTranslate instance using the hardcoded default locale (en_US).  Used as a fallback in case the shared StringTranslate singleton instance fails to translate a key.

name: underlyingSet
desc: The set for this ForwardingSet to forward methods to.

name: downloadThreadsStarted
desc: The number of download threads that we have started so far.

name: multiplyDeBruijnBitPosition
desc: Though it looks like an array, this is really more like a mapping.  Key (index of this array) is the upper 5 bits of the result of multiplying a 32-bit unsigned integer by the B(2, 5) De Bruijn sequence 0x077CB531.  Value (value stored in the array) is the unique index (from the right) of the leftmost one-bit in a 32-bit unsigned integer that can cause the upper 5 bits to get that value.  Used for highly optimized "find the log-base-2 of this number" calculations.

name: networkManagers
desc: A list containing all NetworkManager instances of all endpoints

name: endpoints
desc: Contains all endpoints added to this NetworkSystem

name: isAlive
desc: True if this NetworkSystem has never had his endpoints terminated

name: damageIsAbsolute
desc: Whether or not the damage ignores modification by potion effects or enchantments.

name: isCollidedHorizontally
desc: True if after a move this entity has collided with something on X- or Z-axis

name: isCollidedVertically
desc: True if after a move this entity has collided with something on Y-axis

name: isDead
desc: Gets set by setDead, so this must be the flag whether an Entity is dead (inactive may be better term)

name: width
desc: How wide this entity is considered to be

name: height
desc: How high this entity is considered to be

name: isCollided
desc: True if after a move this entity has collided with something either vertically or horizontally

name: lastTickPosZ
desc: The entity's Z coordinate at the previous tick, used to calculate position during rendering routines

name: lastTickPosY
desc: The entity's Y coordinate at the previous tick, used to calculate position during rendering routines

name: stepHeight
desc: How high this entity can step up when running into a block to try to get over it (currently make note the entity will always step up this amount and not just the amount needed)

name: prevDistanceWalkedModified
desc: The previous ticks distance walked multiplied by 0.6

name: lastTickPosX
desc: The entity's X coordinate at the previous tick, used to calculate position during rendering routines

name: entityCollisionReduction
desc: Reduces the velocity applied by entity collisions by the specified percent.

name: noClip
desc: Whether this entity won't clip with collision or not (make note it won't disable gravity)

name: nextStepDistance
desc: The distance that has to be exceeded in order to triger a new step sound and an onEntityWalking event on a block

name: riddenByEntity
desc: The entity that is riding this entity

name: ridingEntity
desc: The entity we are currently riding

name: preventEntitySpawning
desc: Blocks entities from spawning when they do their AABB check to make sure the spot is clear of entities that can prevent spawning.

name: ignoreFrustumCheck
desc: Render entity even if it is outside the camera frustum. Only true in EntityFish for now. Used in RenderGlobal: render if ignoreFrustumCheck or in frustum.

name: inWater
desc: Whether this entity is currently inside of water (if it handles water movement that is)

name: hurtResistantTime
desc: Remaining time an entity will be "immune" to further damage after being hurt.

name: ticksExisted
desc: How many ticks has this entity had ran since being alive

name: fireResistance
desc: The amount of ticks you have to stand inside of fire before be set on fire

name: addedToChunk
desc: Has this entity been added to the chunk its within

name: thrower
desc: The entity that threw this throwable item.

name: potionDamage
desc: The damage value of the thrown potion that this EntityPotion represents.

name: targetZ
desc: 'z' location the eye should float towards.

name: targetX
desc: 'x' location the eye should float towards.

name: targetY
desc: 'y' location the eye should float towards.

name: arrowShake
desc: Seems to be some sort of timer for animating an arrow.

name: canBePickedUp
desc: 1 if the player can pick up the arrow

name: knockbackStrength
desc: The amount of knockback an arrow applies when it hits a mob.

name: entityDragonObj
desc: The dragon entity this dragon part belongs to

name: innerRotation
desc: Used to create the rotation animation when rendering the crystal.

name: lightningState
desc: Declares which state the lightning bolt is in. Whether it's in the air, hit the ground, etc.

name: boltLivingTime
desc: Determines the time before the EntityLightningBolt is destroyed. It is a random integer decremented over time.

name: boltVertex
desc: A random long that is used to change the vertex of the lightning rendered in RenderLightningBolt

name: isBoatEmpty
desc: true if no player in boat

name: hoverStart
desc: The EntityItem's random initial float height.

name: health
desc: The health of this EntityItem. (For example, damage for tools)

name: age
desc: The age of this EntityItem (used to animate it up and down as well as expire it)

name: player
desc: The player whose inventory this is.

name: inventoryChanged
desc: Set true whenever the inventory changes. Nothing sets it false so you will have to write your own code to check it and reset the value.

name: armorInventory
desc: An array of 4 item stacks containing the currently worn armor pieces.

name: currentItem
desc: The index of the currently held item (0-8).

name: mainInventory
desc: An array of 36 item stacks indicating the main player inventory (including the visible bar).

name: inventoryWidth
desc: the width of the crafting inventory

name: eventHandler
desc: Class containing the callbacks for the events on_GUIClosed and on_CraftMaxtrixChanged.

name: stackList
desc: List of the stacks in the crafting matrix.

name: stackResult
desc: A list of one item containing the result of the crafting formula

name: upperChest
desc: Inventory object corresponding to double chest upper part

name: lowerChest
desc: Inventory object corresponding to double chest lower part

name: container
desc: The brewing stand this slot belongs to.

name: turnProgress
desc: appears to be the progress of the turn

name: xpOrbHealth
desc: The health of this XP orb.

name: xpValue
desc: This is how much XP this orb has.

name: xpOrbAge
desc: The age of the XP orb in ticks.

name: xpColor
desc: A constantly increasing value that RenderXPOrb uses to control the colour shifting (Green / yellow)

name: particleIcon
desc: The icon field from which the given particle pulls its texture.

name: particleBlue
desc: The blue amount of color. Used as a percentage, 1.0 = 255 and 0.0 = 0.

name: particleRed
desc: The red amount of color. Used as a percentage, 1.0 = 255 and 0.0 = 0.

name: particleGreen
desc: The green amount of color. Used as a percentage, 1.0 = 255 and 0.0 = 0.

name: entity
desc: Entity that had been hit and done the Critical hit on.

name: flameScale
desc: the scale of the flame FX

name: materialType
desc: the material type for dropped items/blocks

name: bobTimer
desc: The height of the current bob

name: maximumTime
desc: the maximum time for the explosion

name: yOffs
desc: renamed from yOffset to fix shadowing Entity.yOffset

name: attackTarget
desc: The active target the Task system uses for tracking

name: numTicksToChaseTarget
desc: How long to keep a specific target entity

name: isJumping
desc: used to check whether entity is jumping.

name: newRotationPitch
desc: The new yaw rotation to be applied to the entity.

name: entityAge
desc: The age of this EntityLiving (used to determine when it dies)

name: newPosX
desc: The new X position to be applied to the entity.

name: newPosY
desc: The new Y position to be applied to the entity.

name: newRotationYaw
desc: The new yaw rotation to be applied to the entity.

name: newPosRotationIncrements
desc: The number of updates over which the new position and rotation are to be applied to the entity.

name: attackingPlayer
desc: The most recent player that has attacked this entity

name: recentlyHit
desc: Set to 60 when hit by the player or the player's wolf, then decrements. Used to determine whether the entity should drop items on death.

name: deathTime
desc: The amount of time remaining this entity should act 'dead', i.e. have a corpse in the world.

name: experienceValue
desc: The experience points the Entity gives.

name: dead
desc: This gets set on entity death, but never used. Looks like a duplicate of isDead

name: hurtTime
desc: The amount of time remaining this entity should act 'hurt'. (Visual appearance of red tint)

name: maxHurtTime
desc: What the hurt time was max set to last.

name: attackedAtYaw
desc: The yaw at which this entity was last attacked from.

name: scoreValue
desc: The score value of the Mob, the amount of points the mob is worth.

name: landMovementFactor
desc: A factor used to determine how far this entity will move each tick if it is walking on land. Adjusted by speed, and slipperiness of the current block.

name: jumpMovementFactor
desc: A factor used to determine how far this entity will move each tick if it is jumping or falling.

name: potionsNeedUpdate
desc: Whether the DataWatcher needs to be updated with the active potions

name: limbSwing
desc: Only relevant when limbYaw is not 0(the entity is moving). Influences where in its swing legs and arms currently are.

name: entityLivingToAttack
desc: is only being set, has no uses as of MC 1.1

name: livingSoundTime
desc: Number of ticks since this EntityLiving last produced its sound

name: prevRotationYawHead
desc: Entity head rotation yaw at previous tick

name: maximumHomeDistance
desc: If -1 there is no maximum distance

name: jumpTicks
desc: Number of ticks since last jump

name: hasAttacked
desc: returns true if a creature has attacked recently only used for creepers and skeletons

name: fleeingTick
desc: Used to make a creature speed up and wander away when hit.

name: entityToAttack
desc: The Entity this EntityCreature is set to attack.

name: aggroCooldown
desc: Cooldown time between target loss and new target aquirement.

name: slimeJumpDelay
desc: ticks until this slime jumps again

name: stareTimer
desc: A player must stare at an enderman for 5 ticks before it becomes aggressive. This field counts those ticks.

name: teleportDelay
desc: Counter to delay the teleportation of an enderman towards the currently attacked target

name: timeSinceIgnited
desc: The amount of time since the creeper was close enough to the player to ignite

name: lastActiveTime
desc: Time when this creeper was last in an active state (Messed up code here, probably causes creeper animation to go weird)

name: angerLevel
desc: Above zero if this PigZombie is Angry.

name: randomSoundDelay
desc: A random delay until this PigZombie next makes a sound.

name: allySummonCooldown
desc: A cooldown before this entity will search for another Silverfish to join them in battle.

name: heightOffset
desc: Random offset used in floating behaviour

name: homeCheckTimer
desc: deincrements, and a distance-to-home check is done at 0

name: lastTentacleAngle
desc: the last calculated angle of the tentacles in radians

name: tentacleAngle
desc: angle of the tentacles in radians

name: squidRotation
desc: appears to be rotation in radians; we already have pitch & yaw, so this completes the triumvirate.

name: breeding
desc: This is representation of a counter for reproduction progress. (Note that this is different from the inLove which represent being in Love-Mode)

name: timeUntilNextEgg
desc: The time until the next egg is spawned.

name: fleeceColorTable
desc: Holds the RGB table of the sheep colors - in OpenGL glColor3f values - used to render the sheep colored fleece.

name: sheepTimer
desc: Used to control movement as well as wool regrowth. Set to 40 on handleHealthUpdate and counts down with each tick.

name: aiTempt
desc: The tempt AI task for this mob, used to prevent taming while it is fleeing.

name: isWet
desc: true is the wolf is wet else false

name: timeWolfIsShaking
desc: This time increases while wolf is shaking and emitting water particles.

name: needsInitilization
desc: addDefaultEquipmentAndRecipies is called if this is true

name: ringBufferIndex
desc: Index into the ring buffer. Incremented once per tick and restarts at 0 once it reaches the end of the buffer.

name: dragonPartArray
desc: An array containing all body parts of this dragon

name: ringBuffer
desc: Ring buffer array for the last 64 Y-positions and yaw rotations. Used to calculate offsets for the animations.

name: dragonPartHead
desc: The head bounding box of a dragon

name: dragonPartBody
desc: The body bounding box of a dragon

name: animTime
desc: Animation time, used to control the speed of the animation cycles (wings flapping, jaw opening, etc.)

name: forceNewTarget
desc: Force selecting a new flight target at next tick if set to true.

name: healingEnderCrystal
desc: The current endercrystal that is healing this dragon

name: slowed
desc: Activated if the dragon is flying though obsidian, white stone or bedrock. Slows movement and animation speed.

name: experienceTotal
desc: The total amount of experience the player has. This also includes the amount of experience within their Experience Bar.

name: experienceLevel
desc: The current experience level the player is on.

name: inventoryContainer
desc: The Container for the player's inventory (which opens when they press E)

name: openContainer
desc: The Container the player has open.

name: itemInUseCount
desc: This field starts off equal to getMaxItemUseDuration and is decremented on each tick

name: startMinecartRidingCoordinate
desc: Holds the coordinate of the player when enter a minecraft to ride.

name: itemInUse
desc: This is the item that is in use when the player is holding down the useItemButton (e.g., bow, food, sword)

name: spawnChunk
desc: holds the spawn chunk of the player

name: prevTimeInPortal
desc: The amount of time an entity has been in a Portal the previous tick

name: playerLocation
desc: the current location of the player

name: sleeping
desc: Boolean value indicating weather a player is sleeping or not

name: timeInPortal
desc: The amount of time an entity has been in a Portal

name: inPortal
desc: Whether the entity is inside a Portal

name: xpCooldown
desc: Used by EntityPlayer to prevent too many xp orbs from getting absorbed at once.

name: dimension
desc: Which dimension the player is in (-1 = the Nether, 0 = normal world)

name: foodStats
desc: The food object of the player, the general hunger logic.

name: flyToggleTimer
desc: Used to tell if the player pressed jump twice. If this is at 0 and it's pressed (And they are allowed to fly, as defined in the player's movementInput) it sets this to 7. If it's pressed and it's greater than 0 enable fly.

name: fishEntity
desc: An instance of a fishing rod's hook. If this isn't null, the icon image of the fishing rod is slightly different

name: experience
desc: The current amount of experience the player has within their Experience Bar.

name: loadedChunks
desc: LinkedList that holds the loaded chunks.

name: destroyedItemsNetCache
desc: entities added to this list will  be packet29'd to the player

name: managedPosX
desc: player X position as seen by PlayerManager

name: managedPosZ
desc: player Z position as seen by PlayerManager

name: itemInWorldManager
desc: The ItemInWorldManager belonging to this player

name: playerNetServerHandler
desc: The NetServerHandler assigned to this player by the ServerConfigurationManager.

name: playerConqueredTheEnd
desc: Set when a player beats the ender dragon, used to respawn the player at the spawn point while retaining inventory and XP

name: isChangingQuantityOnly
desc: set to true when player is moving quantity of items from one inventory to another(crafting) but item in either slot is not changed

name: currentWindowId
desc: The currently in use window ID. Incremented every time a window is opened.

name: lastExperience
desc: Amount of experience the client was last set to

name: lastHealth
desc: amount of health the client was last set to

name: sprintToggleTimer
desc: Used to tell if the player pressed forward twice. If this is at 0 and it's pressed (And they are allowed to sprint, aka enough food on the ground etc) it sets this to 7. If it's pressed and it's greater than 0 enable sprinting.

name: sprintingTicksLeft
desc: Ticks left before sprinting is disabled.

name: ticksSinceMovePacket
desc: Counter used to ensure that the server sends a move packet (Packet11, 12 or 13) to the client at least once a second.

name: hasSetHealth
desc: has the client player's health been set?

name: wasOnGround
desc: Check if was on ground last update

name: oldMinY
desc: Old Minimum Y of the bounding box

name: pvpEnabled
desc: Indicates whether PvP is active on the server or not.

name: allowFlight
desc: Determines if flight is allowed or not.

name: worldIsBeingDeleted
desc: If true, there is no need to save chunks or stop the server, because that is already being done.

name: serverOwner
desc: Username of the server owner (for integrated servers)

name: timeOfLastWarning
desc: Set when warned for "Can't keep up", which triggers again after 15 seconds.

name: currentTask
desc: The task the server is currently working on(and will output on outputPercentRemaining).

name: percentDone
desc: The percentage of the current task finished so far.

name: serverStopped
desc: Indicates to other classes that the server is safely stopped.

name: serverRunning
desc: Indicates whether the server is running or not. Set to false to initiate a shutdown.

name: tickables
desc: Collection of objects to update every tick. Type: List<IUpdatePlayerListBox>

name: canSpawnAnimals
desc: True if the server has animals turned on.

name: onlineMode
desc: True if the server is in online mode.

name: isTakingScreenshot
desc: Makes sure it doesn't keep taking screenshots when both buttons are down.

name: inGameHasFocus
desc: Does the actual gameplay have focus. If so then mouse and keys will effect the player instead of menus.

name: debugUpdateTime
desc: Approximate time (in ms) of last update to debug string

name: running
desc: Set to true to keep the game loop running. Set to false by shutdown() to allow the game loop to exit cleanly.

name: debug
desc: String that shows the debug information

name: minecraft
desc: Set to 'this' in Minecraft constructor; used by some settings get methods

name: memoryReserve
desc: A 10MiB preallocation to ensure the heap is reasonably sized.

name: renderEngine
desc: The RenderEngine instance used by Minecraft

name: renderViewEntity
desc: The Entity from which the renderer determines the render viewpoint. Currently is always the parent Minecraft class's 'thePlayer' instance. Modification of its location, rotation, or other settings at render time will modify the camera likewise, with the caveat of triggering chunk rebuilds as it moves, making it unsuitable for changing the viewpoint mid-render.

name: currentScreen
desc: The GuiScreen that's being displayed at the moment.

name: debugProfilerName
desc: Profiler currently displayed in the debug screen pie chart

name: fontRenderer
desc: The font renderer used for displaying and measuring text.

name: rightClickDelayTimer
desc: When you place a block, it's set to 6, decremented once per tick, when it's 0, you can place another block.

name: refreshTexturePacksScheduled
desc: Checked in Minecraft's while(running) loop, if true it's set to false and the textures refreshed.

name: debugFPS
desc: This is set to fpsCounter every debug screen update, and is shown on the debug screen. It's also sent as part of the usage snooping.

name: gameSettings
desc: The game settings that currently hold effect.

name: objectMouseOver
desc: The ray trace hit that the mouse is over.

name: cause
desc: The Throwable that is the "cause" for this crash and Crash Report.

name: crashReportSections
desc: Holds the keys and values of all crash report sections.

name: commandSet
desc: The set of ICommand objects currently loaded.

name: commandMap
desc: Map of Strings to the ICommand objects they represent

name: allowedCharacters
desc: Array of the special characters that are allowed in any text drawing of Minecraft.

name: rotateRight
desc: Maps a direction to that to the right of it.

name: rotateLeft
desc: Maps a direction to that to the left of it.

name: facingToDirection
desc: Maps a Facing value (3D) to a Direction value (2D).

name: rotateOpposite
desc: Maps a direction to that opposite of it.

name: directionToFacing
desc: Maps a Direction value (2D) to a Facing value (3D).

name: offsetsZForSide
desc: gives the offset required for this axis to get the block at that side.

name: offsetsXForSide
desc: gives the offset required for this axis to get the block at that side.

name: offsetsYForSide
desc: gives the offset required for this axis to get the block at that side.

name: oppositeSide
desc: Converts a side to the opposite side. This is the same as XOR'ing it with 1.

name: numCleans
desc: Number of times this Pool has been cleaned

name: nextPoolIndex
desc: Next index to use when adding a Pool Entry.

name: maxPoolIndex
desc: Largest index reached by this Pool (can be reset to 0 upon calling cleanPool)

name: numEntriesToRemove
desc: Number of Pool entries to remove when cleanPool is called maxNumCleans times.

name: listAABB
desc: List of AABB stored in this Pool

name: maxNumCleans
desc: Maximum number of times the pool can be "cleaned" before the list is shrunk

name: hitVec
desc: The vector position of the hit

name: blockZ
desc: z coordinate of the block ray traced against

name: sideHit
desc: Which side was hit. If its -1 then it went the full length of the ray trace. Bottom = 0, Top = 1, East = 2, West = 3, North = 4, South = 5.

TODO: this variable should really be named "poolSize", but I'm not renaming it right now in case any mods are actually (inappropriately) using it instead of using the accessor method..

name: lightUpdateBlockList
desc: is a temporary list of blocks and light values used when updating light levels. Holds up to 32x32x32 blocks (the maximum influence of a light source.) Every element is a packed bit value: 0000000000LLLLzzzzzzyyyyyyxxxxxx. The 4-bit L is a light level used when darkening blocks. 6-bit numbers x, y and z represent the block's offset from the original block, plus 32 (i.e. value of 31 would mean a -1 offset

desc: Holds the description of the achievement, ready to be formatted and/or displayed.

name: maxDisplayRow
desc: Is the biggest row used to display a achievement on the GUI.

name: achievementList
desc: Holds a list of all registered achievements.

name: minDisplayRow
desc: Is the smallest row used to display a achievement on the GUI.

name: maxDisplayColumn
desc: Is the biggest column used to display a achievement on the GUI.

name: minDisplayColumn
desc: Is the smallest column used to display a achievement on the GUI.

name: snipeSkeleton

name: portal
desc: Is the 'We Need to Go Deeper' achievement

name: slotHash

name: valueEntry

name: nextEntry

name: hashEntry

name: keySet

name: growFactor

name: versionStamp

name: count

name: slots

name: worldTime

name: lastTimePlayed
desc: The last time the player was in this world.

name: spawnY
desc: The spawn zone position Y coordinate.

name: spawnZ
desc: The spawn zone position Z coordinate.

name: spawnX
desc: The spawn zone position X coordinate.

name: randomSeed
desc: Holds the seed of the currently world.

name: rainTime
desc: Number of ticks until next rain.

name: saveVersion
desc: Introduced in beta 1.3, is the save version for future control.

name: raining
desc: True if it's raining, false otherwise.

name: levelName
desc: The name of the save defined at world creation.

name: sizeOnDisk
desc: The size of entire save of current world on the disk, isn't exactly.

name: mapFeaturesEnabled
desc: Whether the map features (e.g. strongholds) generation is enabled or disabled.

name: thunderTime
desc: Number of ticks untils next thunderbolt.

name: SIN_TABLE

name: optionValue
desc: the value held by the hash at the specified key

name: nextEntry
desc: the next hashentry in the table

name: key

name: percentUseable
desc: percent of the hasharray that can be used without hash colliding probably

name: modCount
desc: count of times elements have been added/removed

name: numHashElements
desc: the number of elements in the hash array

name: capacity
desc: the maximum amount of elements in the hash (probably 3/4 the size due to meh hashing function)

name: hashArray
desc: the array of all elements in the hash

name: dirty
desc: Whether this MapDataBase needs saving to disk.

name: mapName
desc: The name of the map data nbt

name: playersArrayList
desc: Holds a reference to the MapInfo of the players who own a copy of the map

name: playersHashMap

name: lastPlayerLocationOnMap

name: mapDataObj
desc: reference in MapInfo to MapData object

name: currentRandomNumber
desc: updated by x = mod(x*11,128) +1  x-1 is used to index field_76209_b and field_76210_c

name: entityplayerObj
desc: Reference for EntityPlayer object in MapInfo

name: materialMapColor

name: canBurn
desc: Bool defining if the block can burn or not.

name: replaceable
desc: Determines whether blocks with this material can be "overwritten" by other blocks when placed - eg snow, vines and tall grass.

name: isTranslucent
desc: Indicates if the material is translucent

name: requiresNoTool
desc: Determines if the material can be harvested without a tool (or with the wrong tool)

name: mobilityFlag
desc: Mobility information flag. 0 indicates that this block is normal, 1 indicates that it can't push other blocks, 2 indicates that it can't be pushed.

name: mapColorArray
desc: Holds all the 16 colors used on maps, very similar of a pallete system.

name: colorIndex
desc: Holds the index of the color used on map.

name: colorValue
desc: Holds the color in RGB value that will be rendered on maps.

name: itemWeight
desc: The Weight is how often the item is chosen(higher number is higher chance(lower is lower))

name: minimumChanceToGenerateItem
desc: The minimum chance of item generating.

name: maximumChanceToGenerateItem
desc: The maximum chance of item generating.

name: itemId
desc: The Item/Block ID to generate in the Chest.

name: entityClass
desc: Holds the class of the entity to be spawned.

name: enchantmentobj
desc: Enchantment object associated with this EnchantmentData

name: enchantmentLevel
desc: Enchantment level associated with this EnchantmentData

name: generatorCollection

name: isUnblockable
desc: This kind of damage can be blocked or not.

name: difficultyScaled
desc: Whether this damage source will have its damage amount scaled based on the current difficulty.

name: projectile
desc: This kind of damage is based on a projectile or not.

name: fireDamage
desc: This kind of damage is based on fire or not.

name: liquidColor
desc: Is the color of the liquid for this potion.

name: potionId

name: statusIconIndex
desc: The index for the icon displayed when the potion effect is active.

name: isBadEffect
desc: This field indicated if the effect is 'bad' - negative - for the entity.

name: freeLargeArrays

name: inUseLargeArrays
desc: A list of pre-allocated int[cacheSize] arrays that were previously returned by getIntCache() and which will not be re-used again until resetIntCache() is called.

name: freeSmallArrays

name: inUseSmallArrays

name: duration

name: amplifier
desc: The amplifier of the potion effect

name: potionID
desc: ID value of the potion this effect matches.

name: serverUrl
desc: URL of the server to send the report to

name: leafDistanceLimit
desc: Sets the distance limit for how far away the generator will populate leaves from the base leaf node.

name: leafNodes
desc: Contains a list of a points at which to generate groups of leaves.

name: trunkSize
desc: Currently always 1, can be set to 2 in the class constructor to generate a double-sized tree trunk for big trees.

name: heightLimitLimit
desc: Sets the limit of the random value used to initialize the height limit.

name: numberOfBlocks
desc: The number of blocks to generate.

name: woodMetadata
desc: Sets the metadata for the wood blocks used

name: leavesMetadata
desc: Sets the metadata for the leaves used in huge trees

name: baseHeight
desc: The base height of the tree

name: mushroomType
desc: The mushroom type. 0 for brown, 1 for red.

name: metaLeaves
desc: The metadata value of the leaves to use in tree generation.

name: vinesGrow
desc: True if this tree should grow Vines.

name: metaWood
desc: The metadata value of the wood to use in tree generation.

name: minTreeHeight
desc: The minimum height of a generated tree.

name: radius
desc: The maximum radius used when generating a patch of blocks.

name: numberOfBlocks
desc: The number of blocks to generate.

name: itemsToGenerateInBonusChest
desc: Value of this int will determine how much items gonna generate in Bonus Chest.

name: bonusChestGenerator
desc: Instance of WeightedRandomChestContent what will randomly generate items into the Bonus Chest.

name: regionsByFilename
desc: A map containing Files as keys and RegionFiles as values

name: dimensionId
desc: The id for the dimension (ex. -1: Nether, 0: Overworld, 1: The End)

name: isHellWorld
desc: States whether the Hell world provider is used(true) or if the normal world provider is used(false)

name: hasNoSky
desc: A boolean that tells if a world does not have a sky. Used in calculating weather and skylight

name: worldChunkMgr
desc: World chunk manager being used to generate chunks

name: depthBits
desc: Log base 2 of the chunk height (128); applied as a shift on Z coordinate

name: depthBitsPlusFour
desc: Log base 2 of the chunk height (128) * width (16); applied as a shift on X coordinate

name: xPosition
desc: The x coordinate of the chunk.

name: isChunkLoaded
desc: Whether or not this Chunk is currently loaded into the World

desc: A map, similar to heightMap, that tracks how far down precipitation can fall.

name: updateSkylightColumns
desc: Which columns need their skylightMaps updated.

name: isLit
desc: Determines if the chunk is lit or not at a light value greater than 0.

name: lastSaveTime
desc: The time according to World.worldTime when this chunk was last saved

name: sendUpdates
desc: Updates to this chunk will not be sent to clients if this is false. This field is set to true the first time the chunk is sent to a client, and never set to false.

name: isModified
desc: Set to true if the chunk has been modified and needs to be updated internally.

name: hasEntities
desc: Whether this Chunk has any Entities and thus requires saving on every tick

name: entityLists

name: isTerrainPopulated

name: zPosition
desc: The z coordinate of the chunk.

name: blocklightArray

name: blockMSBArray

name: skylightArray

name: minHeight

name: maxHeight

name: topBlock

name: fillerBlock

name: biomeID

name: waterColorMultiplier

name: enableRain

name: enableSnow

name: sky
desc: Is the biome used for sky world.

desc: The number of sand patches to generate per chunk. Sand patches only generate when part of it is underwater.

name: grassPerChunk
desc: The amount of tall grass to generate per chunk.

name: deadBushPerChunk
desc: The number of dead bushes to generate per chunk. Used in deserts and swamps.

name: sandPerChunk2
desc: The number of sand patches to generate per chunk. Sand patches only generate when part of it is underwater. There appear to be two separate fields for this.

name: clayPerChunk
desc: The number of clay patches to generate per chunk. Only generates when part of it is underwater.

name: bigMushroomsPerChunk
desc: Amount of big mushrooms per chunk

name: generateLakes
desc: True if decorator should generate surface lava & water

name: chunk_Z

name: randomGenerator

name: chunk_X

name: currentWorld

name: bigMushroomGen
desc: Field that holds big mushroom generator

name: treesPerChunk

name: xPosition

name: zPosition
desc: The z coordinate of the BiomeCacheBlock.

name: rainfallValues

name: biomes

name: biomeCache

name: biomesToSpawnIn

name: modelDragon

name: snowmanModel

name: generatorVersion

name: canBeCreated
desc: Whether this world type can be generated. Normally true; set to false for out-of-date generator versions.

name: isWorldTypeVersioned
desc: Whether this WorldType has a version or not.

name: bonusChestEnabled

name: hardcoreEnabled

name: mapFeaturesEnabled
desc: Switch for the map features. 'true' for enabled, 'false' for disabled.

name: nextTickEntryID

name: tickEntryID
desc: The id of the tick entry

name: scheduledTime

name: yCoord

desc: Z position this tick is occuring at

name: xCoord
desc: X position this tick is occuring at

name: chunkXPos
desc: The X position of this Chunk Coordinate Pair

desc: Mobs have a chance to drop more loot

desc: Knockback enchantments for bows, the arrows will knockback the target when hit.

name: power
desc: Power enchantment for bows, add's extra damage to arrows.

desc: Holds the base factor of enchantability needed to be able to use the enchant.

desc: Holds how much each level increased the enchantability factor to be able to use this enchant.

name: thresholdEnchantability
desc: Used on the formula of base enchantability, this is the 'window' factor of values to be able to use thing enchant.

name: protectionName
desc: Holds the name to be translated of each protection type.

name: baseEnchantability
desc: Holds the base factor of enchantability needed to be able to use the enchant.

desc: Defines the type of damage of the enchantment, 0 = all, 1 = undead, 3 = arthropods

name: levelEnchantability
desc: Holds how much each level increased the enchantability factor to be able to use this enchant.

desc: True if the renderer supports multitextures and the OpenGL version != 1.3

name: defaultTexUnit

name: timeLastSeen

name: livingModifier
desc: Used to calculate the (magic) extra damage based on enchantments of current equipped player item.

name: source

name: damageModifier
desc: Used to calculate the damage modifier (extra armor) on enchantments that the player have on equipped armors.

name: socket

name: enchantmentRand

name: socket
desc: The socket we're using to send packets on.

name: recipeItems

name: recipeOutput
desc: Is the ItemStack that you get when craft the recipe.

name: recipeWidth

name: recipeHeight

name: recipeItems

name: recipeOutput

name: recipes

name: maxDamage

name: unlocalizedName
desc: The unlocalized name of this item.

name: enchantability
